name: Dog Fest Duck Fillet On Chewy Stick 90g
description: Carefully picked, freshly cooked duck fillets cover a long lasting rawhide stick. This combination is exactly what each dog needs to have a great time and enjoy the rich flavor of real meat. Composition: duck, rawhide, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 54, crude fat 3, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 18.
